headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: They will seek revenge for what you've done...
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.
Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.

headlines.h: Weather Alert: I Guess That Explains Some Things 😼😼😼
headlines.b: Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.

headlines.h: Opinion: I’m making a game about a black cat outlaw, and our artist keeps giving him more personality than some people I know (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.
